lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior and interior have significant damage and heavy signs of wear. There are known mechanical and electrical issues that require immediate repair.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic work. The engine runs but exhibits a persistent knock, and the transmission shifts roughly between gears. The exterior shows substantial wear, including extensive rust on the rocker panels and several large dents. Inside, the upholstery is heavily damaged with multiple tears and significant staining. This car is being sold strictly as-is and is recommended for someone looking for a major project or a parts donor.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior shows visible scratches and small dents, and the interior has significant wear from regular use. All mechanical systems are currently functional, though some components may require maintenance soon.
The car is in good condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive mechanical and cosmetic repairs to be roadworthy. The engine currently suffers from a significant oil leak and the transmission exhibits rough shifting between gears. On the exterior, there is widespread rust on the rocker panels and wheel wells, along with several large dents and a cracked windshield. The interior is heavily worn, featuring torn upholstery and non-functional electronics. This car is being sold as-is and is best suited as a project vehicle or for parts.

Get ready to enjoy the drive in this fantastic car! It has been well-maintained and is in good shape, offering a smooth and reliable performance. While it shows some light, expected wear from careful use, it’s a wonderful vehicle that's ready for many more miles. A great find for anyone looking for a dependable and well-cared-for ride!

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a superior balance of performance and aesthetic refinement. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, the automobile demonstrates consistent mechanical integrity and remains in a condition that will satisfy the most discerning professional. We are proud to offer this exceptional specimen, which provides a sophisticated driving experience and enduring value for its next proprietor.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty ride and it's been such a joy to own. It's in really solid shape and runs beautifully—perfect for someone who wants a dependable car that still looks great on the road! I’ve taken good care of it, and I’m looking for a quick sale to a good home. Let’s get you behind the wheel for a test drive!

Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Minor cosmetic wear. Clean title. Runs well.

Offered here is a well-maintained example that strikes an ideal balance between performance and everyday usability. The exterior is finished in a timeless coat that still holds a high-gloss reflection, with body panels that remain straight and true. While you may find the occasional minor blemish from standard road use, the overall curb appeal remains striking. The interior is equally impressive, featuring a clean, odor-free cabin where the bolsters on the seats remain firm and the dashboard shows no signs of sun fading or cracking. Every button, switch, and infotainment feature operates exactly as intended. Under the hood, the vehicle

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. This unit has been maintained to a high standard, offering a reliable and sophisticated driving experience. With a comprehensive service history and a well-appointed interior, it stands as a testament to quality engineering and responsible ownership. A premier selection for the professional seeking long-term value and proven performance.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies consistent care and mechanical integrity. This offering features a clean interior profile and a robust powertrain, ensuring a refined driving experience for its next owner. Thoroughly inspected to meet our professional standards, it represents an exceptional balance of reliable performance and sophisticated value.

Hey there! You've gotta check out this beauty! It’s been such a fantastic car for me, and it’s still in wonderful shape and ready to hit the road. It’s super reliable, looks great, and drives like a dream. I’ve taken really good care of it, and I know you’re going to love it as much as I have. Let’s get you behind the wheel for a test drive!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a high-revving valvetrain. Mated to a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual, the drivetrain is solid with a factory-spec limited-slip differential ensuring optimal power delivery. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing replacement and a comprehensive VANOS overhaul. The chassis remains taut with upgraded subframe reinforcement plates already installed. While the exterior shows minor road patina consistent with its driver-grade status, the mechanical integrity is superb, offering a visceral, high-RPM experience for the true purist.
Clean title. Runs well. Regular maintenance performed. Minor exterior wear. Solid daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and comfort. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish with only minor, age-appropriate cosmetic imperfections, while the alloy wheels remain crisp and clean. Inside, you’ll find a smoke-free cabin featuring supple leather seating that shows minimal wear, a responsive infotainment system, and dual-zone climate control for a premium driving experience. Mechanically, this car is sound; it has been serviced regularly with a documented history, ensuring the engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts seamlessly. With its reliable track record and impressive curb appeal, this car is ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and long-term value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience supported by rigorous mechanical standards. Its sophisticated exterior is matched by a well-preserved interior, ensuring both comfort and prestige for the discerning owner. A premier choice for those seeking engineering excellence without compromise.

This distinguished vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a seamless fusion of performance and reliability. Every aspect of this automobile reflects a commitment to quality, ensuring a refined driving experience that exceeds standard expectations for its class.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s looking for a new home! It’s been super reliable and is still in really great shape, perfect for your daily commute or a fun weekend getaway. It drives like a dream and has been well-cared for. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 is a mechanically robust example featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing. The high-revving powerplant is mated to a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox, delivering power through a variable M differential lock. It retains excellent torsional rigidity with a reinforced rear subframe and a refreshed suspension featuring upgraded bushings for precise turn-in. Recent service includes a comprehensive valve adjustment and rod bearing replacement, ensuring the internal reciprocating assembly is within peak operating tolerances. A purist’s spec that prioritizes longitudinal and lateral performance over aesthetic
Used car in good condition. Clean title. Well-maintained. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained luxury sedan offers a perfect blend of performance and everyday practicality. The exterior paint retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor, expected signs of careful road use, while the body remains straight and free of significant blemishes. Step inside to a cabin that has been kept in impressive order; the leather upholstery is supple and free of tears, the dashboard is crack-free, and every electronic component—from the dual-zone climate control to the premium audio system—functions exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, benefiting from a documented history of on-time oil changes and preventative maintenance. The suspension is tight, providing a comfortable yet responsive ride, and the tires have significant life left. This is a reliable, well-cared-for vehicle that delivers a premium driving experience without the new-car price tag.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies a superior balance of performance and long-term value. This unit has undergone a rigorous professional inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic distinction. An ideal acquisition for the discerning driver who prioritizes reliability and refined engineering. We invite you to experience the uncompromising quality of this exceptional offering.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, confirming its mechanical integrity and consistent service history. The interior remains well-preserved, and the exterior reflects the care of a dedicated previous owner. This is an ideal selection for the discerning driver seeking a reliable, high-caliber driving experience. Available for immediate acquisition.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she’s been absolute perfection. It’s in really solid shape and has clearly been well-loved over the years—perfect for someone looking for a reliable daily driver that still looks sharp on the road. It runs like a dream and is ready for its next big adventure with you! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E92 M3 features the legendary S65 naturally aspirated 4.0L V8, delivering linear power delivery up to an 8,400 RPM redline via eight individual throttle bodies. Mated to a precise 6-speed manual gearbox, the drivetrain is complemented by an M Variable Differential Lock for optimal longitudinal traction. The chassis remains taut with Electronic Damper Control (EDC) providing adjustable compression and rebound stages. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing replacement and updated throttle actuators, ensuring the high-revving internal combustion assembly remains within factory tolerances. This example exhibits minor cosmetic patina consistent with its age but retains exceptional mechanical integrity and torsional rigidity.
Used car. Good condition. Clean interior. Mechanically sound. Minor exterior wear. Ready for sale.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and reliability for the discerning driver. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, showing only minor stone chips consistent with careful road use, while the smoke-free interior features supple leather upholstery and fully functional climate controls. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, boasting a comprehensive service history, a smooth-shifting transmission, and a recent set of premium tires. Every button and feature works as intended, reflecting a life of consistent care and indoor garaging. It is a turn-key example ready for its next chapter, providing a refined driving experience that rivals much newer models.

We are pleased to present this impeccably maintained vehicle, representing a premier choice for the discerning driver. This motorcar has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and aesthetic integrity. Featuring a refined interior and a robust powertrain, it offers a sophisticated driving experience. We invite you to experience the caliber of this exceptional offering in person.
